who: HR teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 expense submissions/week
offer: For HR teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/week, non-compliance causes financial discrepancies. We audit expense submissions instead of manual review of expense submissions.
problem: Ensuring compliance with expense submission policies
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR teams seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on expense workflows
Direct message 20-50 HR teams with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try manual review and compliance alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing expense data
Enable one-click export of compliance reports
